failures.description: The catalog search dependency timed out, preventing the agent from obtaining the evidence needed to answer the cheapest available Electric Kettle.
failures.checklist_reasoning: At index 3, the agent attempted the required ProductCatalogSearch tool call with well-formed arguments. The tool returned an explicit infrastructure/connectivity-style error: catalog search dependency timed out after 30000ms, type CatalogServiceTimeoutError. This is not a schema or argument validation issue, and the earlier plan/tool call matched the user goal. The failure was not resolved later; the executor only reported that the task could not be completed.
